message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ArrowColor #000000
  ActorBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
}

actor User
participant CouponPage
participant DB_Beanstalkd
participant UserMail

User -> CouponPage : Load merchant page with cashback
CouponPage --> User : Return page with discounts

User -> CouponPage : Clicks on cashback
CouponPage --> User : Returns 2 tabs, on tab 1 the reflink to merchant,\non tab 2 a popup with cashback formular(email)

User -> CouponPage : Fills email, submits form
CouponPage --> DB_Beanstalkd : Saves cashback request

CouponPage --> User : Sends new content for checkout popup, simultaneously\nopens reflink with uaid in a new tab(3)

CouponPage --> UserMail : Sends new email with link to cashback form

@enduml
